score_based.perfect: Excellent work. You got a perfect score, which shows strong understanding and careful reading.
score_based.good: Well done. Your result is good, and a quick review of weaker points can make it even better.
score_based.needs_practice: Do not worry. Mistakes are part of learning Python, and each retry builds your confidence.

login_based.consistent: Your regular login habit is a strength. Consistent practice usually leads to better programming skill.
login_based.new_user: Welcome to the chatbot. Start with one topic, learn step by step, and build momentum.

mood_support.stressed: Take a short break, breathe slowly, and return to one small question at a time. Progress in coding does not need to be rushed.
mood_support.confused: Confusion means you are meeting a new idea. Review one example carefully, then try a similar question again.
